title: Why Inference is hard..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains the complexity of LLM inference, covering model loading and quantization methods (mmap, GGUF, AWQ, EXL2, FP8, NVFP4) and inference engines (llama.cpp, vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, TGI). The video discusses pre-fill, decoding, and concurrent serving challenges.
